PREAMB.AGENCY: DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES
PREAMB.SUBAGY: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
PREAMB.SUBJECT: Meeting of the Advisory Board on Radiation and Worker Health

AGY.P: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), Department of Health and Human Services (HHS).

SUM.P: In accordance with the Federal Advisory Committee Act, the CDC announces the following meeting.

SUPLINF.P: The Advisory Board was established under the Energy Employees Occupational Illness Compensation Program Act of 2000.
The charter was issued on August 3, 2001.

SIG.NAME: Kalwant Smagh,
SIG.TITLE: Director, Office of Strategic Business Initiatives.
